title: paraixeris dentata
intro: Paraixeris dentata, also known as the toothed paraixeris or toothed tickseed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Paraixeris dentata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
